parameters.query:
WITH available_locations AS (
  SELECT l.*
  FROM locations l
  WHERE (l.metadata->>'is_available')::int = 1
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT l.*
  FROM available_locations l
  WHERE l.location_type != 'poi'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT l.*
  FROM available_locations l
  WHERE l.location_type = 'poi'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM available_locations l2
    WHERE lower(l2.name) = lower(l.name)
    AND l2.source_system_id = l.source_system_id
    AND l2.location_type != 'poi'
  )
),
base_slugs AS (
  SELECT *,
    trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))) AS base_slug
  FROM deduped
),
final_slugs AS (
  SELECT *,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY base_slug) > 1 THEN
        base_slug || '-' || trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(
          replace(COALESCE(
            NULLIF(metadata->>'moon_name', ''),
            NULLIF(metadata->>'jurisdiction_name', ''),
            source_id
          ), '+', ' plus '),
          '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'
        )))
      ELSE base_slug
    END AS slug
  FROM base_slugs
),
terminal_data AS (
  SELECT
    tt.location_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'source_id',   tt.source_id,
        'name',        tt.name,
        'type',        tt.terminal_type,
        'code',        tt.metadata->>'code',
        'screenshot',  tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live', (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean
      ) ORDER BY tt.name
    ) AS terminals
  FROM trade_terminals tt
  WHERE tt.location_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY tt.location_id
),
shop_data AS (
  SELECT
    si.uex_location_id,
    jsonb_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object(
      'shop',          si.shop,
      'category',      si.category,
      'terminal_type', tt.terminal_type
    ) ORDER BY jsonb_build_object(
      'shop',          si.shop,
      'category',      si.category,
      'terminal_type', tt.terminal_type
    )) AS shops
  FROM datap4k_shop_inventory si
  LEFT JOIN trade_terminals tt ON tt.source_id = si.terminal_source_id
  WHERE si.uex_location_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY si.uex_location_id
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  fs.slug,
  'location',
  fs.name,
  NULL,
  fs.location_type,
  (fs.metadata->>'id')::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',             fs.name,
    'location_type',    fs.location_type,
    'source_id',        fs.source_id,
    'source_system_id', fs.source_system_id,
    'source_body_id',   fs.source_body_id,
    'code',             fs.metadata->>'code',
    'wiki',             fs.metadata->>'wiki',
    'nickname',         fs.metadata->>'nickname',
    'subtype',          fs.metadata->>'subtype',
    'pad_types',        fs.metadata->>'pad_types',
    'orbit_name',       fs.metadata->>'orbit_name',
    'planet_name',      fs.metadata->>'planet_name',
    'moon_name',        fs.metadata->>'moon_name',
    'faction_name',     fs.metadata->>'faction_name',
    'jurisdiction_name', fs.metadata->>'jurisdiction_name',
    'star_system_name', fs.metadata->>'star_system_name',
    'system_code',      s.metadata->>'code',
    'services', jsonb_build_object(
      'has_food',           (fs.metadata->>'has_food')::boolean,
      'has_shops',          (fs.metadata->>'has_shops')::boolean,
      'has_clinic',         (fs.metadata->>'has_clinic')::boolean,
      'has_refuel',         (fs.metadata->>'has_refuel')::boolean,
      'has_repair',         (fs.metadata->>'has_repair')::boolean,
      'has_refinery',       (fs.metadata->>'has_refinery')::boolean,
      'has_habitation',     (fs.metadata->>'has_habitation')::boolean,
      'has_cargo_center',   (fs.metadata->>'has_cargo_center')::boolean,
      'has_docking_port',   (fs.metadata->>'has_docking_port')::boolean,
      'has_loading_dock',   (fs.metadata->>'has_loading_dock')::boolean,
      'has_trade_terminal', (fs.metadata->>'has_trade_terminal')::boolean,
      'has_freight_elevator', (fs.metadata->>'has_freight_elevator')::boolean,
      'has_quantum_marker', (fs.metadata->>'has_quantum_marker')::boolean
    ),
    'flags', jsonb_build_object(
      'is_armistice',      (fs.metadata->>'is_armistice')::boolean,
      'is_monitored',      (fs.metadata->>'is_monitored')::boolean,
      'is_landable',       (fs.metadata->>'is_landable')::boolean,
      'is_decommissioned', (fs.metadata->>'is_decommissioned')::boolean,
      'is_available_live', (fs.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean
    ),
    'metadata',           fs.metadata,
    'terminals',          COALESCE(td.terminals, '[]'::jsonb),
    'datap4k_shops',      COALESCE(sd.shops, '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(fs.name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(fs.metadata->>'nickname', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(fs.metadata->>'star_system_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(fs.metadata->>'planet_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(fs.metadata->>'moon_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(fs.metadata->>'faction_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(fs.location_type, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM final_slugs fs
LEFT JOIN active_systems s ON s.source_id = concat('star_systems:', fs.source_system_id)
LEFT JOIN terminal_data td ON td.location_id = fs.id
LEFT JOIN shop_data sd ON sd.uex_location_id = fs.id
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc ON esc.entity_type = 'location' AND esc.uex_slug = fs.slug
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
